requirements.description: Declare AI content usage preferences with Content Signals in robots.txt
requirements.shortPrompt: Add Content-Signal directives to your robots.txt declaring preferences for ai-train, search, and ai-input.
requirements.prompt:
Add Content-Signal directives to your robots.txt declaring preferences for ai-train, search, and ai-input. For example:
Content-Signal: ai-train=no, search=yes, ai-input=no
